overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character in a red robe and straw hat walking through a lush forest environment. The character traverses a wooded trail with prayer flags, passes a campfire, moves through rocky grassland with distant smoke, and finally enters a dramatic field of red spider lilies with bright backlighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with hanging prayer flags

events.description: blue prayer flags become visible hanging from tree branches
campfire fire becomes visible through the trees ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily along forest path with sword sheathed, approaching the campfire

entered.detail: dense forest trees with green foliage surrounding the path
small pink flowers dotting the forest floor
blue cloth banners hanging from tree branches
orange flames visible through the trees ahead
large gray boulder visible through the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a narrow forest trail surrounded by dense green trees and pink wildflowers. Blue prayer flags hang from branches on the left, and a campfire becomes visible ahead through the trees. The path is earthy and winding, with a large rock outcrop appearing on the right side.

events.description: dark smoke plume becomes visible on the horizon indicating distant fire
sky gradually darkens as character approaches the smoke area

agents.ego_description: traversing rocky grassland terrain, moving toward the distant smoke plume

entered.detail: dark gray smoke rising into the sky from beyond the hill
tall green grass covering the ground
scattered rocks and boulders on the grassy hillside

segments.scene_description: Leaving the forest behind, the character emerges into a wide-open rocky grassland. A large rock outcrop looms closer on the right while a dark smoke plume becomes visible on the horizon. The terrain shifts to grassy hills with scattered boulders, and the sky gradually darkens as the character approaches the smoke.

scene_state.functional_zone: field of red spider lilies with bright backlighting

events.description: environment transitions dramatically to field of red spider lilies with intense bright backlighting
sun creates strong backlight effect through the red flowers and atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: walking through dense field of red flowers toward the bright sun on the horizon

entered.detail: dense field of bright red flowers covering the entire ground
intense sunlight creating silhouette effect and atmospheric glow

segments.scene_description: The scene transforms dramatically into a vast field of red spider lilies stretching toward the horizon. The sun shines intensely from ahead, creating a silhouette effect and illuminating the red petals. The dark smoke and rocky terrain are left behind as the character walks through the waist-high crimson flowers toward the bright light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded forest trail into a vast, luminous field of crimson flowers. It begins with the samurai walking along a winding earthy path flanked by dense green trees, pink wildflowers, and blue prayer flags, moving steadily toward a distant campfire. As the character leaves the canopy behind, the scene opens into a wide rocky grassland where the terrain shifts to rolling hills and a dark plume of smoke appears on the horizon under a darkening sky. The environment then transforms dramatically as the rocky landscape gives way to a sea of waist-high red spider lilies stretching toward the horizon. Finally, the camera follows the character into the heart of the crimson field, where intense backlighting from the sun creates a silhouette effect and illuminates the vibrant petals.
